# Sample Output (One Simulation Run)
# Note: Output varies due to randomness in QKD process

========= INPUT =========
Alice Key   : 0111000111101011111001111000000010000101000111000010001011000111
Bob Key     : 0111000011101011111001111000000010000101000110000010001011000111
Alice Basis : 0110000101011000010100111011010011101110100110100110010110001001
Bob Basis   : 1111001110111010101111110010011011101111001110010111001011101111

========= SIFTING =========
Sifted Alice: 0110000100001001000000110000000010000100000111000010000010000001
Sifted Bob  : 0110000000001001000000110000000010000100000110000010000010000001
Mask        : 0110110100011101000100110110110111111110010111001110100010011001

========= PRE-QBER =========
QBER (pre)  : 0.0555556

========= HAMMING =========
Corrected Key: 0110000100001001000000110000000010000100000111000010000010000001

========= POST-QBER =========
QBER (post) : 0

========= FINAL KEY =========
Alice Final : 00011111011010000101111111011111
Bob Final   : 00011111011010000101111111011111
